script: for f in /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py /home/azureuser/yooai-responder.py /home/azureuser/yooopenai-responder.py; do NAME=$(basename $f .py); echo "===== $NAME ====="; ls -la $f; echo '--- truncation/length patterns ---'; grep -nE 'len\([a-zA-Z_]+\)[[:space:]]*>[[:space:]]*[0-9]{3,}|\[:[0-9]{3,}\]|TRUNC|MAX_[A-Z_]*LEN|MAX_[A-Z_]*CHAR|MAX_REPLY' $f | head -10; echo '--- top-level constants ---'; grep -nE '^[A-Z_]+ = [0-9]+' $f | head -10; echo; done
